name: Ideogram 4.0 — text to image
description:
Ideogram 4.0 text-to-image. The prompt is a structured JSON "caption" (high_level_description + style_description + compositional_deconstruction with per-element bboxes) — this is the format Ideogram 4 follows best. Edit the example JSON: change the descriptions, the 'text' of text elements, colors, and bboxes ([y1,x1,y2,x2], normalized 0–1000). The example is composed for a 9:16 portrait frame; if you change the aspect ratio, the bboxes won't line up perfectly.

Quality presets: Turbo (12 steps, fast) / Default (20) / Quality (48, slow & best).
author: Template - ComfyUI

exposedParameters.label: Prompt (structured JSON)
